{{CargoRelic
|name=Panda Compendium
|class_id=20524
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=A customized encyclopedia for panda trainers, this compendium records every panda encountered by the owner, as well as all related information. It's an essential tool for every panda trainer!
|fame=13
|art=14
|fth=16
|civ=32
|tech=15
|ss1=Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +1<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss2=Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +2<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss3=Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss4=Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60
|ss7=Per Species Map entry completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Species Map Entries: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
